emails.subject: Hello from a friend
emails.body: Hello from a friend I have been speaking with an ex-associate of yours from Valero and he asked me to pass on his regards to you, Peter Groetzinger. So, REGARDS from Peter!

emails.subject: Re: Hello from a friend
emails.body: Re: Hello from a friend Thanks for the message from Pete. He's a good guy!
